basic_details.job_title: TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website https://www.tiss.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TISS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Recruitment 2026 is 16-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) post is Class 12th or Higher Secondary (HS) Passed.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 14500 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC category candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST category candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TISS Boy's Hostel Caretaker (Male) Recruitment 2026 will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract job as per the information provided in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article, labeled as "Official Notification PDF".

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of TISS?
faq.answer: The official website of Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is http://www.tiss.ac.in/.
